_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Create metrics that characterize the usability, timeliness, completeness, and accuracy of data for multiple users to reference and use.
reference_document_element_description: Design, build, and publish BI dashboards and reports that meet defined consumer requirements for content, performance, accessibility, and refresh frequency.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-004 (DQ, cosine: 0.515), DQ-S-003 (DQ, cosine: 0.511).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.561). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [accuracy, characterize, completeness, create, data, metrics] vs WIDAI-only terms [accessibility, bi, build, consumer, content, dashboards] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.871, R=0.876). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.9%). "Create metrics that characterize the usability, timeliness, completeness, and ac" and "Design, build, and publish BI dashboards and reports that meet defined consumer" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.555 ≈ STS 0.561 (gap 0.006). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [accuracy, characterize, completeness, create, data, metrics]. WIDAI terms: [accessibility, bi, build, consumer, content, dashboards].
